IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.VAD_STATUS WHERE package_name = 'Vad') = 0 THEN
EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'RUN SQL POST-UNINSTALL SCRIPT' INTO v_result;
DELETE FROM DAV WHERE resource_type IN ('VSP', 'XSLT') AND package_name = 'Vad';
CREATE TABLE test_uninstall (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, package_name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM test_uninstall WHERE package_name IN (SELECT package_name FROM DB.DBA.VAD_STATUS);
DELETE FROM test_uninstall WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_uninstall WHERE package_name = 'Vad' LIMIT 1);
